title: Largest Number At Least Twice of Others
titleCn: 至少是其他数字两倍的最大数

testcases.input: nums = [3,6,1,0] Output: 1 Explanation: 6 is the largest integer. For every other number in the array x, 6 is at least twice as big as x. The index of value 6 is 1, so we return 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: 6 is the largest integer. For every other number in the array x, 6 is at least twice as big as x. The index of value 6 is 1, so we return 1.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4] Output: -1 Explanation: 4 is less than twice the value of 3, so we return -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: 4 is less than twice the value of 3, so we return -1.
